org.exist.collections
Class IndexInfo

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.collections.IndexInfo
public class IndexInfo
extends java.lang.Object

Internal class used to track some required fields when calling Collection.validate(DBBroker, String, Node) and Collection.store(DBBroker, IndexInfo, Node, boolean). This class is not publicly readable.

Author:
wolf
